---
title: "Browse the Database"
execute:
  freeze: false
  echo: false
format:
  html:
    code-fold: false
---

```{r}
#| include: false
library(here)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(DT)

source(here("scripts/00_helpers.R"))
df <- read_csv(here("data/processed/submissions_cleaned.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
```

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true"}
## Interacting with the database

- The **search box** is case insensitive, and will search across all columns and return rows that match the search term(s).
You can also use regular expressions (regex) to search the table. 

- **Hover** your cursor to view the full **description** for each row! 
:::


```{r}
datatable(
  df,
  filter = "top",
  rownames = FALSE,
  escape = FALSE,
  options = list(
    pageLength = 25,
    scrollX = TRUE,
    searchHighlight = TRUE,
    search = list(regex = TRUE, caseInsensitive = TRUE)
    )
)
```
